name: Borewell Drilling
description: Professional borewell drilling up to 1000 feet using advanced rotary rigs.

name: Submersible Pump Installation
description: Supply and installation of high-efficiency submersible pumps for all bore depths.

name: Water Testing
description: Comprehensive water quality testing and analysis reports for potability.

name: Borewell Repair
description: Expert repair and rejuvenation of existing borewells to restore water yield.

name: Motor Repair
description: On-site and workshop repair of submersible motors and panels.

name: Casing & Lining
description: PVC and steel casing installation to prevent borewell collapse.
